summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary

Crest Courier is a global courier and logistics company founded in 2010 by James Crest and Maria Adeyemi in Brooklyn, New York. It delivers to 220+ countries, employs 12,000+ people, and is trusted by over 500,000 businesses — offering same-day, carbon-neutral, and AI-tracked express shipping with a 99.7% on-time rate.
